onboarding.v2Slide1Desc: Instantly access flight info, reservations and more with THY Assistant.
onboarding.v2Slide2Desc: Gemini or ChatGPT — switch models with one tap.
onboarding.v2Slide3Desc: Offline mode, flight mode support. Accessible wherever you are.
onboarding.v2Slide4Desc: Your AI assistant is ready for creative questions and deep analysis.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to THY AI Assistant
auth.registerSubtitle: Enter your email and password to create your account.
auth.name: Full Name

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

network.offlineMessage: You appear to be offline. Content can still be queued; when you’re back online you’ll be able to sync pending work.
network.onlineMessage: If you have messages queued while offline, you can sync them with the server now.
network.onlineMessagePending: {{count}} action(s) queued while offline. Sync now to send them.

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.emptySubtitle: Write a question and your AI assistant will respond.
assistant.quickActionFlightPrompt: I'd like information about my flight. Can you help me with a flight number or route?
assistant.quickActionBaggagePrompt: What are Turkish Airlines' baggage allowance rules and fees?
assistant.quickActionTravelPrompt: Can you give me travel suggestions for beautiful destinations I can visit?
assistant.quickActionCheckinPrompt: How do I do online check-in and when can I start?

settings.title: Settings
settings.sentryDesc: Pressing the button triggers an intentional crash, Sentry captures it and the Error Boundary kicks in.
settings.notificationsOpenSettingsMessage: To turn on notifications, allow them for this app in your device settings.
settings.notificationsTurnOffMessage: To turn off notifications, disable them for this app in your device settings.
settings.streamingDesc: Receive AI responses token by token
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.loginToSync: Sign in to sync your data
settings.displayNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

descriptions.gpt-4.1: Latest GPT-4 generation. Fast, accurate, excels at coding and reasoning.
descriptions.gpt-4.1-mini: Lightweight GPT-4.1. Low cost, fast responses.
descriptions.gpt-4.1-nano: Ultra-fast GPT-4.1 variant for simple, everyday tasks.
descriptions.gpt-4o: Multimodal GPT-4. Handles text, images and audio.
descriptions.gpt-4o-mini: Compact multimodal model. Efficient and affordable.
descriptions.o3: Advanced reasoning model. Solves complex problems step by step.
descriptions.o4-mini: Lightweight reasoning model. Fast and cost-effective.
descriptions.gemini-2.5-pro: Google's most capable model. Deep reasoning and analysis.
descriptions.gemini-2.5-flash: Balanced speed and intelligence. Ideal for daily use.
descriptions.gemini-2.0-flash: Fast and efficient Gemini. Great for real-time tasks.
descriptions.gemini-2.0-flash-lite: Ultra-lightweight Gemini for quick, simple requests.
descriptions.claude-3-7-sonnet: Anthropic's latest Sonnet. Strong at writing and analysis.
descriptions.claude-3-5-haiku: Fast and lightweight Claude. Quick responses.

errorBoundary.title: Something Went Wrong
errorBoundary.message: An unexpected error occurred in our application. Our technical team has been notified and will work on a fix as soon as possible.

chatHistory.title: Chat History
chatHistory.emptySubtitle: Start a new conversation with the assistant.
chatHistory.deleteAlertMessage: "{{title}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
chatHistory.deleteSuccess: Your chat has been successfully deleted
chatHistory.deleteError: Could not delete chat, please try again

toast.loginErrorRateLimited: Please wait 60 seconds and try again
toast.loginErrorUnknown: Sign in failed, please try again
toast.registerVerifyEmail: Please check your inbox and verify your email to finish signing up.
toast.registerErrorAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists
toast.registerErrorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
toast.forgotPasswordSuccess: Reset link sent to your email address
toast.forgotPasswordError: Failed to send, please try again
